_doc: Machine templates. 'ClaimsRuntimeTemplate' maps to the single physical host MOCK-HOST but exposes 4 unattended runtime slots (Runtimes=4). A single Windows workstation seats far fewer concurrent RDP sessions (here 2). The template over-allocates slots relative to what the host can physically seat — root cause of the 'workstation in use' faults under concurrency.

Data.Name: ClaimsRuntimeTemplate
Data.Description: Runtime template for the ClaimsProcessing folder. Bound to the single workstation MOCK-HOST.

Data.Name: SharedRuntimeTemplate
Data.Description: Unrelated template in the Shared folder.
